response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work in recent roles, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development that directly matches the unusual AI agent requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and a strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, trunk-based development, test-framework authorship) round out the profile. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, though the breadth of languages and frameworks suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching a rare job requirement
Long, consistent full-stack track record with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Kubernetes
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, workshops and mentoring
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed among languages; Java exposure appears dated
Significant time investment in niche DLang ecosystem and side projects may indicate divergence from the primary stack

key_factors.factor: Depth and duration of TypeScript/Node/React full-stack experience
